item.title: ThursdayвҖҷs Les Paul post but with a strat this timeрҹҺё Lesson...
item.description:
View on Instagram


ThursdayвҖҷs Les Paul post but with a strat this timeрҹҺё Lesson, TAB and backing track for this solo is available on my вһЎпёҸ PatreonрҹӨ рҹҡӮ $5/month to get access to all of my lessons, licks, solos, etudes, backing tracks and much more! (LINK IN BIO)вҖўвҖўвҖў#guitar #guitarist #telecaster #guitarsolo #guitarlicks #guitarra#doublestops #country #countryguitar #chickenpicking #teletuesday

item.title: This to me is the most fun to play country guitar - combine open...
item.description:
View on Instagram
